'''zhamulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvulopalatopharyngoplasty|uvulopalatopharyngoplasty]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvulopalatopharyngoplasty|uvulopalatopharyngoplasty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhamulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæmilith|zhæmilith]] || [[word:zhæmilij|zhæmilij]] || [[word:zhæmilish|zhæmilish]] || [[word:zhæmili|zhæmili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamumuluth|zhamumuluth]] || [[word:zhamumuluj|zhamumuluj]] || [[word:zhamumulush|zhamumulush]] || [[word:zhamumulu|zhamumulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamuluth|zhamuluth]] || [[word:zhamuluj|zhamuluj]] || [[word:zhamulush|zhamulush]] || [[word:zhamulu|zhamulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamufluth|zhamufluth]] || [[word:zhamufluj|zhamufluj]] || [[word:zhamuflush|zhamuflush]] || [[word:zhamufluf|zhamufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhamuluthu|zhamuluthu]] || [[word:zhamuluju|zhamuluju]] || [[word:zhamulushu|zhamulushu]] || [[word:zhamuluku|zhamuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhamuluth|zhamuluth]] || [[word:zhamuluj|zhamuluj]] || [[word:zhamulush|zhamulush]] || [[word:zhamulu|zhamulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhamuluthul|zhamuluthul]] || [[word:zhamulujul|zhamulujul]] || [[word:zhamulushul|zhamulushul]] || [[word:zhamulukul|zhamulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhamuluthuthu|zhamuluthuthu]] || [[word:zhamulujuju|zhamulujuju]] || [[word:zhamulushushu|zhamulushushu]] || [[word:zhamuluku|zhamuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhamuluthun|zhamuluthun]] || [[word:zhamulujun|zhamulujun]] || [[word:zhamulushun|zhamulushun]] || [[word:zhamulukun|zhamulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhamuluthuoro|zhamuluthuoro]] || [[word:zhamulujuoro|zhamulujuoro]] || [[word:zhamulushuoro|zhamulushuoro]] || [[word:zhamulukuoro|zhamulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
